LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LISA DE LA SOL'S MOTION TO COMPEL WRITTEN DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHOUT OBJECTIONS FROM DEFENDANTS THE DOCUMENT COMPANY, INC AND XEROX CORPORATION AND FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. SANCTIONS REQUESTED BY BOTH SIDES ARE DENIED. THE MOTION HAS BEEN MOOTED BY DEFENDANTS' SERVICE OF AMENDED RESPONSES. NEITHER SIDE'S POSITION LACKED SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. Plaintiff Lisa De La Sol's Motion To Compel Written Discovery Responses and Production of Documents without objections from defendants the Document Company, Inc and Xerox Corporation and for sanctions is Denied.
